response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed-systems and backend experience with event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems, which aligns with parts of the CTO role. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of multi-agent AI system production experience in fintech or regulated environments, and his leadership scale is unproven beyond mid-size teams. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not yet demonstrated at scale.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures and microservices
Proven ability to scale engineering teams and implement disciplined development practices
Experience with real-time systems and low-latency applications in high-throughput environments
concerns: Limited direct experience with agentic AI systems in production, especially in fintech or regulated contexts
No clear track record scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people or in venture-backed scale-ups
Lacks demonstrated fintech-infrastructure familiarity (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)

key_factors.factor: Engineering leadership at scale (10+ to 30+ teams)
